title: Agentcard icon tile
summary: Adaptive live tile metadata for the Windows Clippy agentcard icon workflow, including the packaged asset set and the tools that generated it.

generation.promptSummary: Single clipped-corner capability card with a centered agent spark, optimized for Windows Clippy and 32x32 readability.
generation.negativeConstraints: No text, borders, multiple cards, profile avatars, screenshots, or low-contrast detail.

tools.name: dayour-icon
tools.purpose: Turns icon briefs into FLUX.2 prompts, package specs, and review artifacts.

tools.name: image_flux_2_pro
tools.purpose: Generates the master square icon candidate through the local llm-lib bridge.

tools.name: python-postprocess
tools.purpose: Resizes the selected master into 192/32/focused PNG outputs and copies widget assets.

tools.name: adaptive-card-files
tools.purpose: Defines the tile template, data schema, and live data payload consumed by the widget window.

review.summary: The current agentcard assets are packaged and ready for widget preview.
notes: Icon assets are stored under E:\Windows-Clippy-MCP\assets.
The focused 32px icon is a derived active-state variant.
The schema and template are now local to the widget repo.
